---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: 'OOH Session #121...<br>[{{< iconify noto:package >}}`package`{{< iconify fluent-emoji-flat:package >}}<br>{{< iconify noto:no-entry >}}]{.bigger}[citations!!]{.dancing}[{{< iconify noto:no-entry >}}]{.bigger}'
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: ../../../img/copcite.png #https://cdn.vectorstock.com/i/500p/89/26/police-officer-writing-ticket-traffic-violation-vector-36628926.jpg   
#  data-background-opacity: ".4"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://png.pngtree.com/png-clipart/20220724/ourmid/pngtree-cute-packaging-delivery-box-png-image_6046130.png  #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
filters: 
  - reveal-header
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {layout="[[10,10],]"}
::: first-column
+ Recap session #120
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [{{< iconify noto:package >}}`package`{{< iconify fluent-emoji-flat:package >}}<br>{{< iconify noto:no-entry >}}[citations!!]{.dancing}{{< iconify noto:no-entry >}}](https://yihui.org/rmarkdown-cookbook/write-bib#write-bib)
+ Shared problem-solving

:::

::: second-column

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 185px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/3_10_26">
  <img src="/img/title120.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#120: 

![](https://pngimg.com/d/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="50" top="200"}

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/95/Zotero_icon.png){.absolute width="170" top="245" right="80"}

## [[Zotero]{.zotero .Bigger}](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/front-matter.html) {background-image="https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/599c8ee149fc2bd3b045f4d2/1543517888687-LXFVC2MA16UNCIRFOSNG/587b4fb344060909aa603a75.png" background-opacity=".3"}

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Imp/Ex--porting

::: {.columns .Smaller}

::: {.column width="44%"}

1. {{< iconify mdi:wand >}} ISBN, DOI (or other) identifier
2. `File`{{< iconify maki:arrow >}}`Import...` -- then find your .bib file(s)
3. browser [extensions/ connectors](https://www.zotero.org/download/connectors)

:::

::: {.column width="56%"}
:::

:::

![](../../../img/zotsnip.png){.absolute right="-140" bottom="120"}

### {{< iconify devicon:rstudio >}} & {{< iconify devicon:positron >}}

::: {.columns .smaller}

::: {.column width="55%"}

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

Both have identical interface within the `visual` editor(s)

However -- Zotero [needs to be OPEN]{.underline} for Positron use -- R Studio will find entries regardless of whether Zotero is currently open or not

:::

:::

![](../../../img/zoteropos.png){.absolute left="-120" bottom="70" height="300"}

### Styles

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}

1. Find desired style (use [Style Search](https://www.zotero.org/styles))
2. Click hyperlink to download
3. Place in project directory
4. Call out within [YAML]{.ranchers2} {{< iconify emojione:left-arrow flip=horizontal >}}

:::

::: {.column width="40%"}

::: {.callout-note}

10,840 styles listed on [Zotero Style Repository](https://www.zotero.org/styles)

:::

```{r}
#| code-line-numbers: "5"
---
title: "My Document"
format: pdf
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl                 #<1>
---
```
1. first--level specification unless using `format: typst` (see next tab)

:::

:::


![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/046/032/545/non_2x/illustration-on-a-transparent-background-cartoon-fox-little-fox-running-fox-free-png.png){.absolute bottom="370" left="-180" height="250"}

### `typst` 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}

>use `citeproc: true` to force Pandoc citation processor -- seemed to be more important for inline styling (end--of--document bibliography looked good)

:::

::: {.column width="35%"}

<br>

```{r}
#| code-line-numbers: "5"
---
title: "My Document"
format:
  typst:
    citeproc: true               #<1> 
    csl: apa.csl                 #<1>
bibliography: references.bib
---
```
1. Has been historically effective -- forcing the "normal" Pandoc citation processor
:::

:::


:::

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExaTVmM3NnMGx6aTg3dWF4eW90dG5xb25zN2FvaTlxbDJsdGx4YWZyMCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/v8pACm7D82olW/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-150" top="-30" height="270"}

# Today...

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZ2ZjcHZ3dW13bGZlb3NteGs0Z3I4a2dtZ2NjZnZqcHA0dHVodzR0eiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/vmTfdbGr8CwLB4S6lM/giphy.gif)

## [`package` [citations!!]{.dancing}](https://yihui.org/rmarkdown-cookbook/write-bib#write-bib)


::: {.columns .smaller}

::: {.column width="40%"}

### `knitr` functions

+ [`.packages()`](https://github.com/yihui/knitr/blob/master/R/defaults.R)
  + hidden ("dot" prefix)
+ [`write_bib()`](https://yihui.org/rmarkdown-cookbook/write-bib)
  + will overwrite existing .bib file
  + use separate .bib for "other" citations

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

### structure

::: {.fragment .semi-fade-out fragment-index=1}

Chunk:

```{r}
knitr::write_bib(c
    (.packages(), 
      "ggplot2"), 
    "packages.bib")
```
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-in fragment-index=1}

[YAML]{.ranchers2}:

```{r}
#| code-line-numbers: "4"
---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
bibliography: packages.bib
---
```

:::

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

### [other options](https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/papaja/versions/0.1.4/topics/cite_r)

+ [`grateful`](https://pakillo.github.io/grateful/) 
+ [`pakret`](https://arnaudgallou.github.io/pakret/)

:::

:::

![](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMW9tNWl6dWNwOHhtN2gwcmJ1ZzEwb2VwdHd4ZXNoNnhxeWh6bDUzOCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/3oz8xL4uzr5Rd3ZEwU/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-80" bottom="20" height="240"}

![](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcDJjODFtYmk1eWltY2xja250amZkMmRmcHhjMnlocDN5a2Q0NTU4dyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/3o6MbelROhsc0E03XG/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-150" top="-40" height="220"}

![](https://pngimg.com/d/box_PNG49.png){.absolute right="-130" top="250" height="180"}

![](https://appsilon.github.io/shiny.semantic/reference/figures/hexsticker.png){.absolute left="-170" top="125" height="150"}

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/5a/Ggplot2_hex_logo.png/250px-Ggplot2_hex_logo.png){.absolute left="-120" bottom="300" height="150"}

![](https://tidyverse.org/css/images/hex/tidyr.png){.absolute left="-170" bottom="165" height="150"}

![](https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/html/images/logo-purrr.png){.absolute left="-120" bottom="20" height="170"}



## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: {{< iconify fxemoji:fourleafclover >}}{{< iconify fxemoji:fourleafclover >}}{{< iconify fxemoji:fourleafclover >}}{{< iconify fxemoji:fourleafclover >}}
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
sessionInfo()
```

![](https://www.clipartmax.com/png/full/361-3613443_luck-clipart-leprechaun-lucky-charms-leprechaun-png.png){.absolute right="-140" top="-30" height="300"}

![](https://images.vexels.com/media/users/3/230393/isolated/preview/b8b675c65440b31aa8c29fbd667ca6a1-pot-of-gold-flat.png){.absolute right="150" bottom="-20" height="350"}
